tasks.description: Created CPM Skills Reference HTML — interactive 18-skill reference guide with architecture diagram, search, category sections, and modal detail views for each skill
Switched CPM report cron from daily to weekly Monday 8am ET — updated vercel.json, cpm-report.js header, REFERENCE.md, launchd-schedule SKILL.md, and vercel-serverless SKILL.md

Designed cross-machine automatic ROI session logging architecture — evaluated git hook vs GitHub Actions approach, identified computer-independence requirements, designed session JSON schema and GitHub Action workflow
